mapper.insert: insert into dish (name,category_id ,price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, now(), now(), #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select:
select d.* ,c.name as categoryName from dish d left join category c on d.category_id = c.id
and d.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and d.category_id = #{categoryId}
order by create_time desc
mapper.update:
update dish
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
update_time = now(),
update_user = #{updateUser}
where id = #{id}
